subject: Suspicious phishing infrastructure cluster
objective: Summarize public indicators and recommend defensive containment steps.
summary: Public infrastructure overlaps suggest an active credential harvesting cluster that should be blocked and monitored.

findings.title: Landing page overlaps with recent phishing lure pattern
findings.summary: The hostname and URL structure match a recent credential harvesting naming convention and were first observed within the last 24 hours.

evidence.detail: Observed first resolution within the last 24 hours.
A new certificate was issued for the same hostname.

recommendations: Block the domain and landing URL at secure web gateways.
Review mailbox telemetry for matching lure text.

next_steps: Add the domain and IP to monitoring and block lists.
Review inbound email telemetry for matching lure themes.
